subject: handoff
body: FedML screenshot check: ml/federated/simulate_swarm.sh is a localhost synthetic swarm harness (builds vps-aggregator + edge-worker, runs 10 workers, measures duration/avg per worker, then kills processes). It should stay SIMULATED / local execution evidence, not production scalability or uptime evidence.
